title: Unique Party 28797 Foil Balloon-45 cm-Union Jack Party, Multicolour
features: Pack of 15 Red, White & Blue Assorted Latex Balloons
Latex balloons measure 30 cm when fully inflated (ship flat)
Ideal for decorating a patriotic party
Packaged balloons may vary in colour or shade from inflated balloons
Combine with other Union Jack party supplies from Unique Party
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Ruby Red Bright White Royal Blue Union Jack Whether it be a party to cheer on your national team at a sports event, celebrating a royal Jubilee street party, bake-off competition or summer fair, these patriotic designs are ideal to celebrate all things British! A great selection of tableware will let you celebrate in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & More... More coordinating ranges available! If Union Jack isn't your taste, check out our other stylish options. Sweet & Succulent Palm Tropical Luau Boho Fiesta Mexican Fiesta Blue Reef Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews — 4.4 out of 5 stars 166 — 4.2 out of 5 stars 344 — We have a vast selection of beautiful party themes to choose from! Bask in the sweetness of the Summertime sunshine with these fruity designs! Add some Tropical flavour to your Summertime celebrations, whether it be a picnic in the park, Birthday or Hawaiian theme party, with these colourful designs! Celebrate fiesta style with these Boho inspired designs! Head south of the border and celebrate Fiesta style with these Mexican inspired designs! Chill out in the Summer sun and dive into a picnic with these aquatic designs!

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Warning: CHOKING HAZARD-Children under 8 years can choke or suffocate on uninflated or broken balloons. Adult supervision required. Keep uninflated balloons from children. Discard broken balloons at once. MADE OF NATURAL RUBBER LATEX. TO PROTECT THE EYES FROM POSSIBLE DAMAGE, THE USE OF A BALLOON PUMP OR HELIUM TANK IS RECOMMENDED. STRETCH BALLOONS BEFORE INFLATING. DO NOT OVER INFLATE.
